title: Big Tech Is Buying Up Open Source... Vite Is Next
summary: Cloudflare acquired VoidZero, the company behind Vite, Vitest, Rolldown, and Oxc. Better Stack analyzes why Cloudflare is consolidating developer tooling, explores the broader trend of big tech buying open source tools, and discusses whether this consolidation warrants concern for the open source community.
